markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align content strategy with Logic's fundraising and growth goals.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Shift:** The focus is now on high-intent keywords (e.g., "how to build an agent") to capture users before they commit to competitors like LangChain, directly supporting Logic's fundraising narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [**New KPIs:** Success will be measured by a funnel: Impressions → Clicks → Sign-ups. This proves GTM effectiveness for investors, with sign-ups as the critical metric.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [**Content Quality:** Recent articles show a "step change" in technical nuance. A "conflict check" will fix recurring issues (e.g., model version numbers) in the content pipeline's source artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [**New Tool:** A proprietary LLM visibility tracking platform, launching Feb 2–7, will provide more accurate citation data than Scrunch by distinguishing between "Logic" (the company) and "logic" (the concept).](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Quality

  - [Recent articles show a "step change" in quality, adding helpful technical nuance.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Feedback is now "yellow" (editorial), not "red" (egregious errors), indicating significant progress.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [A recurring issue is the reappearance of previously addressed feedback, such as including specific model version numbers (e.g., GPT-4).](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [**Cause:** A conflict in the source artifacts used by the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [**Action:** Rachel will run a "conflict check" to resolve these issues.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)

### New Content Strategy & KPIs

  - [**North Star:** Paying customers.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [**Goal:** Prove GTM effectiveness for fundraising by demonstrating an ability to reliably acquire users.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [**New Funnel-Based KPIs:**](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
      - [**Impressions:** Shows presence for target keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
      - [**Clicks:** Shows ability to drive traffic to the site.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
      - [**Sign-ups:** The most compelling metric, proving user acquisition and creating an optimization problem (monetization) for Logic to solve.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [**Attribution:**](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
      - [Logic uses Statsig to track traffic sources and user funnels.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
      - [No SEO/AEO conversions to paid customers yet.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)
      - [Azzam will provide monthly Statsig data exports to inform the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)

### Content Prioritization

  - [**Tier 1: High-Intent Keywords**](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
      - [**Focus:** "How to build an agent," "ship AI fast," "productionize AI agents."](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Capture users before they commit to competitors (e.g., LangChain, CrewAI), avoiding the high switching costs of targeting users already using another tool.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
      - [**Action:** Expand keyword research to find low-volume, high-intent queries reflecting engineer search behavior.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [**Tier 1 Sub-Pillar: LLM Infra DevEx**](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
      - [**Focus:** Capture search intent for infrastructure components Logic provides out-of-the-box.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
      - [**Examples:** "how to produce tests," "how to enforce output schema."](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Position Logic as the simple solution for complex infrastructure needs.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [**Tier 2: Alternatives & Refreshes**](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
      - [**Alternatives:** Continue targeting keywords like "LangChain alternatives" to capture bottom-of-funnel users researching options.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
      - [**Refreshes:** Prioritize refreshing existing AI use case content (e.g., content moderation) that is already cited by LLMs to capitalize on proven traction.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
  - [**Future Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
      - [**"How to Build an Agent" Guide:** Azzam is creating a \~40-page, ungated guide for February to establish Logic's authority and promote its "spec-driven agents" philosophy.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
      - [**Mega-Content Series:** This guide will be the first in a series of monthly/bi-monthly, high-value, keyword-optimized pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
      - [**Feature-Driven Content:** Validate search demand for new features (most shipping by April 2026) and schedule content refreshes for top-performing posts upon release.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)

### New LLM Visibility Platform

  - [**Launch:** Rolling out to customers Feb 2–7.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [**Function:** Tracks which blog posts are cited by LLMs, the prompts used, and Logic's placement in the answer.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [**Advantage:** More accurate than Scrunch. The platform distinguishes between "Logic" (the company) and "logic" (the concept), providing cleaner, less skewed data.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1798.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1840.0)
      - [Update the content strategy document with new KPIs and prioritization.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
      - [Share the updated document with Azzam for review.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1840.0)
      - [Provide Azzam with access to the new LLM visibility platform after Feb 7.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [**Rachel:**](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [Run a "conflict check" on content artifacts to resolve recurring feedback issues.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [**Azzam:**](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
      - [Provide monthly Statsig data exports to inform content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
      - [Share the "How to Build an Agent" guide with Bailey for editorial review before publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/Msg-eE6XkUNzK5z-VE6zcLzqVbpj3GYH?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
